name: Male!Aether Employee
description:
«[POST-GAME!] A difficult day at work...»

Even though the days of dark disasters were over, there was still plenty of work to be done. And for this poor employee of the Æther Foundation, weariness had taken its toll....

If you have a better name for him, please tell me lol I'm terrible at them T_T

Art credit to Komuramo/Komurapk !! Check it out, it's actually so cool the love they have for this character. I had to search on Danbooru to find their Twitter ^_^
creator: doomedtofall
